title: Separate historical changed-file truth from active lock ownership

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Pre-merge branch head. Rebound to the true merge SHA by ops:proof-generate --merge-sha during post-merge lane-close reconciliation (this object's presence is what makes this file rebindable — see rebindEvidenceJsonSha in scripts/ops/proof-generate.ts).

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane changes only CI-gate TypeScript (no production pick-pipeline code path or migration touched). Live smoke run (apps/api/src/database-smoke.test.ts) regardless per T1 policy.

queries.description: INSERT via processSubmission -- unrelated live-DB smoke coverage, unaffected by this diff
INSERT/UPDATE via processSubmission and transitionPickLifecycle -- unrelated live-DB smoke coverage
INSERT on each transition; SELECT COUNT(*) asserting zero rows for rejected transitions
SELECT COUNT(*) asserting zero rows after a rejected confirmDeliveryAtomic call
INSERT via settlePickAtomic; SELECT asserting correction rows are additive, not mutating
SELECT COUNT(*) asserting audit-row invariants for rejected and successful atomic operations
read-only SELECT scanning for the duplicate (external_id, sport, participant_type) invariant

scope.descope_note: An earlier iteration of this lane built a new ops:lane-close --override CLI mechanism with GitHub-comment-based authorization. It was fully removed by explicit PM decision (privileged-surface scope creep beyond what the underlying file-scope-guard bug requires) and is not present in this diff.

known_gaps: UTV2-1550 itself is not truth-closed by this PR, and this PR builds no mechanism to close it. Live pnpm ops:truth-check UTV2-1550 (read-only) confirms 2 remaining structural failures: L3 (Linear state) and G4 (required checks on the historical merge commit, structurally unsatisfiable per the PR's own incident doc). See verification.md for the exact manual, PM-reviewed action that would be needed.
